h1: Meet PCBWay at Open Sauce 2026 – Visit Us at Booth F.75

headings.text: Meet PCBWay at Open Sauce 2026 – Visit Us at Booth F.75

sections.heading: Meet PCBWay at Open Sauce 2026 – Visit Us at Booth F.75
sections.text: Blog > Meet PCBWay at Open Sauce 2026 – Visit Us at Booth F.75 Meet PCBWay at Open Sauce 2026 – Visit Us at Booth F.75 by: Mila Jun 25,2026 1640 Views 0 Comments Posted in News PCBWay is excited to announce that we will be exhibiting at Open Sauce 2026, one of the world's most unique creator and maker festivals. We warmly invite makers, engineers, hardware developers, creators, startups, and technology enthusiasts to visit us at Booth F.75 and explore how PCBWay can help turn ideas into real products. Event Information Date: July 17–19, 2026 Location : San Mateo County Event Center, California, USA Booth: F.75 Website: https://www.opensauce.com/ About Open Sauce Open Sauce is one of the mos...
